title: Lawrence, Rebecca - Chief Executive Officer, Crown Prosecution Service - ACOBA advice
body: "Ms Lawrence left her role at the Crown Prosecution Service in November 2023.  Commissioner, National Preparedness Commission  Ms Lawrence sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with the National Preparedness Commission. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in September 2024  and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
